findings.project_classification: Monolith Godot 4.6.2 / C# .NET8 RTS creation platform; ECS-inspired SoA sim + MultiMesh presentation; ~19.5k LOC across 74 C# files in godot/src/.
findings.technology_stack: Godot 4.6.2 .NET, C#/.NET8, NakamaClient 3.13.0, Jolt physics (presentation), D3D12, addons godot_mcp + terrain_3d.
key_findings: Strict simulation/presentation layer separation; sim is pure C#, fixed-point deterministic.
Fixed 30Hz SimulationLoop with ordered ISimSystem pipeline (BuildingSystem ... ScenarioDirector last).
Deterministic lockstep with adaptive input delay [2,12]; .chmr replays; Nakama matchmaking.
LLM (Claude + Ollama) trigger scripting and AI map generation with multi-pass validation.
Brownfield deviations: DamageMatrix hardcoded (should be JSON); tests/ empty; asset folders empty (box/procedural placeholders); GDD references future targets (.NET9 AOT, Hero class) absent in code.

completed_steps.summary: Inventoried existing docs (CLAUDE.md x2, GDD, STATUS, Snapshot, LEARNINGS, project-context, server-deploy, modio)
Tech stack: Godot 4.6.2 .NET / C# .NET8; arch = ECS-inspired SoA sim + Godot presentation
Conditional analysis (game type): state-management + asset-inventory documented

resume_instructions: Workflow complete. To update, re-run gds-document-project and choose Re-scan.
